name: Remote Auth
description: Trusted header (forward auth) SSO with role-based library access control
overview: Authenticates Jellyfin users via trusted headers injected by a reverse proxy (Authentik, Authelia, Traefik ForwardAuth, Caddy, etc.) and maps IdP groups to Jellyfin permissions and library access.

versions.changelog: Initial release — header-based SSO with RBAC
